cover.subtitle: Flat No. 1204 · 3 BHK Residential Apartment
cover.address: Plot 14, LBS Marg, Ghatkopar East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400077
cover.addressAsPerDoc: Flat No. 1204, Tower B, Orchid Greens CHS Ltd., LBS Road, Pant Nagar, Mumbai – 400 075
cover.valuationWords: Rupees Two Crore Fifteen Lakh Forty Thousand only

components.name: Living & Dining Hall
components.observation: Well-maintained; paint intact, no visible defects or dampness.

components.name: Modular Kitchen
components.observation: Cabinetry sound & functional; one loose floor tile near sink unit.

components.name: Master Bedroom
components.observation: Ceiling damp patch approx. 2 sq.ft; waterproofing recommended.

components.name: Bedrooms 2 & 3
components.observation: Clean, dry and well-ventilated; fixtures and fittings intact.

components.name: Bathrooms (2 Nos.)
components.observation: Fittings functional, water pressure adequate; minor grouting wear.

components.name: Electrical & Plumbing
components.observation: All points live, MCB panel labelled; minor tap leakage in kitchen.

components.name: External Façade & Walls
components.observation: Plaster and paint in good order; no spalling or exposed rebar.

components.name: Balcony & Railings
components.observation: Structurally sound and anchored; railing paint peeling at edges.

components.name: Lobby & Staircase
components.observation: Clean and well-lit; common-area tiles and handrails intact.

components.name: Terrace & Waterproofing
components.observation: Waterproofing membrane ageing; monitor ahead of next monsoon.

components.name: Foundation & Footing
components.observation: No settlement or differential cracking observed at base.

components.name: RCC Frame & Columns
components.observation: Columns and beams sound; no structural cracks detected.

components.name: Internal Walls & Plaster
components.observation: Hairline cracks, cosmetic in nature; no dampness within walls.

components.name: Ceiling Slab & Beams
components.observation: Active seepage in master-bedroom slab; source to be investigated.

components.name: Living / Dining Tiles
components.observation: Vitrified tiles laid level; isolated hollow sound on tapping.

components.name: Bedroom Flooring
components.observation: Tiles level and well-laid; no chipping, cracking or lippage.

components.name: Kitchen Floor Tiles
components.observation: Cracked and hollow tiles across work zone; relaying recommended.

components.name: Bathroom Flooring
components.observation: Anti-skid tiles intact; slight slope deviation toward drain.

conditions.priorityNote: Ceiling slab seepage in the master bedroom and cracked kitchen floor tiles should be addressed before occupancy or sanction. Photographic evidence is provided on page 04.

items.title: Entrance with Customer
items.note: Inspector with applicant at main entrance

photos.footnote: All photographs are original, unedited and embedded with date, GPS coordinates and capture metadata. High-resolution images are retained in the Kwik Check inspection archive and made available to authorised parties on request, quoting Report No. KC-INSP-2026-04812.

summary.inspectorSummary: The property at Orchid Greens, Tower B — Flat 1204 is structurally sound and fit for occupancy. The RCC frame, foundation and load-bearing elements show no distress, and interiors are well-maintained. Two items warrant attention before sanction or possession: ceiling seepage in the master bedroom and cracked flooring in the kitchen. Neither affects structural safety, and both are readily rectifiable. With these repairs completed, the property is assessed as a sound and well-located residential asset.

valuation.fairMarketWords: Two Crore Fifteen Lakh Forty Thousand only

summary.scope: A non-invasive visual inspection of all accessible areas was carried out against Kwik Check's 142-point protocol. No dismantling, excavation or destructive testing was undertaken. Concealed plumbing, wiring and structural elements behind finishes were not examined.
summary.disclaimer: This report reflects the property's condition on the date of inspection only and is issued for the requesting party. It is an informed professional opinion, not a guarantee or warranty. NGD Kwik Check Pvt. Ltd. accepts no liability for latent defects not reasonably visible at the time of inspection.
